key_items: Bitcoin nears $65K as Trump says Hormuz will 'open to all' in Sunday Iran peace deal
SpaceX Officially Joins Public Bitcoin Leaderboard as 8th Largest Holder With 18,712 BTC
Standard Chartered Calls Crypto Bottom as Bitcoin Price Recovers From $59,000 Low
reasoning: Multiple positive catalysts are converging including geopolitical peace deal prospects reopening risk-on asset flows, major corporate Bitcoin adoption (SpaceX now 8th largest holder), and institutional validation that the crypto cycle low is in place. Analyst consensus from Scaramucci and Novogratz predicts $70K retest by end of July, supported by positive ETF inflows and institutional accumulation signals.
risks: Sharp profit-taking pullback of 10-15% if Iran peace deal fails to materialize or deteriorates, and unresolved quantum computing security concerns for long-term Bitcoin custody could trigger fear-driven selling.
